summary: New Feature tag system for Hive posts tested successfully. All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend components verified - filter bar has New Feature filter, badge component properly styled with green colors, admin dropdown toggle option implemented.
seed_data_creation: Test post created and deleted via API for toggle testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Feature tag system fully functional. Backend endpoint POST /api/posts/{post_id}/new-feature toggles is_new_feature flag (admin only). Frontend filter 'New Feature' in HivePage filters posts. NewFeatureBadge shows green pill with sparkle icon.

backend_tests.test_non_admin_gets_403: PASS - Regular user cannot toggle feature flag
backend_tests.test_admin_can_toggle_new_feature_on: PASS - Admin successfully toggles is_new_feature to true
backend_tests.test_admin_can_toggle_new_feature_off: PASS - Admin successfully toggles is_new_feature to false
backend_tests.test_feed_returns_is_new_feature: PASS - Feed endpoint includes is_new_feature in posts
backend_tests.test_explore_returns_is_new_feature: PASS - Explore endpoint includes is_new_feature in posts

frontend_tests.all_8_filters_present: PASS - All, Now Spinning, New Haul, ISO, For Sale/Trade, A Note, New Feature, Following
frontend_tests.empty_state_message: PASS - Shows 'no New Feature posts yet.' when filter active

features_verified: POST /api/posts/{post_id}/new-feature endpoint exists and requires admin
PostResponse model includes is_new_feature: bool = False
Feed and Explore endpoints return is_new_feature field
NewFeatureBadge component with PILL_STYLES.NEW_FEATURE (bg-green-100, text-green-700, border-green-200)
New Feature filter pill in feed filter bar
Admin dropdown shows 'Tag as New Feature' / 'Remove New Feature' option (code verified)

code_review_verification.backend_hive.py_line_833-844: Toggle endpoint implemented correctly with admin check
code_review_verification.PostCards.js_line_434-441: NewFeatureBadge component with sparkle icon exported
code_review_verification.HivePage.js_line_226: Post card applies green background (#f3faf5) and shadow-md for is_new_feature posts
code_review_verification.HivePage.js_line_249: NewFeatureBadge rendered in post header when is_new_feature
code_review_verification.HivePage.js_line_271-275: Admin dropdown includes toggle feature option with Sparkles icon
